info.name: SlotsOne iGaming Platform API
info.description:
Comprehensive API test collection for the SlotsOne iGaming platform.

Covers: Auth, Slots, European Roulette, American Roulette, History, Provably Fair, System probes, and Negative test cases.

**Environments:**
- Production: https://pyavchik.space
- Prod (domain): https://pyavchik.space
- Local dev: http://localhost:3001

**Test execution order:**
1. System > Health & Ready (verify server is up)
2. Auth > Register (creates test user, sets token)
3. Auth > Login (verifies credentials, refreshes token)
4. Slots > Init > Spin (core game loop)
5. Roulette > Init > Spin (European)
6. American Roulette > Init > Spin
7. History & Provably Fair
8. Negative Tests

**Author:** QA Engineering | SlotsOne Platform

item.name: System
item.description: Liveness and readiness probes. Run these first to confirm the backend is operational.

request.description: Kubernetes-style liveness probe. Returns 200 if the process is alive.

exec: pm.test('Response body has status ok', function () {
pm.test('Response is reachable (HTML or JSON)', function () {

request.description: Readiness probe. Verifies database connectivity and returns latency metrics.

exec: pm.test('Database check present with latency', function () {
pm.test('Response is reachable (HTML or JSON)', function () {

item.name: Auth
item.description:
Authentication flow: register, login, token refresh, logout.

Tokens are RS256 JWTs with 15-minute TTL. Refresh tokens are delivered via httpOnly cookies.

request.description: Register a new player account. Automatically generates a unique email via pre-request script.

exec: pm.test('Response contains valid auth payload', function () {
pm.test('Access token is a valid JWT (3 segments)', function () {

request.description: Login with the previously registered player credentials.

exec: pm.test('Response contains valid auth payload', function () {
// Update token (login may return a different JWT)

request.description:
Rotate the refresh token (sent via httpOnly cookie) and receive a new access token.

Note: Postman must have cookie storage enabled and the refresh_token cookie must have been set by a prior register/login call.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 200 or 401 (no cookie in Postman)', function () {
pm.test('401 response has correct error structure', function () {

request.description: Revoke all refresh tokens for the current user. Clears the httpOnly cookie.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 204 No Content', function () {

request.description: Re-login after logout to restore the access token for subsequent game tests.

item.name: European Roulette
item.description: European Roulette (37 numbers: 0-36). Features La Partage rule on even-money bets when ball lands on zero.

request.description: Initialize a European Roulette session. Returns config with 37 numbers, bet types, and wheel order.

exec: pm.test('Config has all required bet types', function () {
pm.test('Config has wheel_order with 37 positions', function () {
pm.test('Config has la_partage in features', function () {
pm.test('recent_numbers is array of integers', function () {

request.description: Single straight bet on number 17 ($1.00). Payout: 35:1 if winning.

exec: console.error('[Pre-request] No roulette session. Run Roulette > Init first.');
pm.test('Outcome has winning_number in range 0-36', function () {
pm.test('Win breakdown has correct structure', function () {
pm.test('Payout is correct for straight bet', function () {

request.description: Multiple concurrent bets: red ($5), straight on 0 ($1), split 1-2 ($2). Tests multi-bet settlement logic.

exec: console.error('[Pre-request] No roulette session. Run Roulette > Init first.');
pm.test('total_bet matches sum of individual bets', function () {
pm.test('total_return matches sum of payouts', function () {
const payoutSum = outcome.win.breakdown.reduce((s, b) => s + b.payout, 0);

item.name: American Roulette
item.description:
American Roulette (38 numbers: 0, 00, 1-36). No La Partage. Includes Top Line bet (0, 00, 1, 2, 3).

00 is represented internally as -1.

request.description: Initialize an American Roulette session. Config should have 38 numbers and include topLine bet type.

exec: // Verify auth token before American Roulette init
pm.test('Config has topLine bet type (unique to American)', function () {

request.description: American roulette spin with a straight bet on 17 and a red outside bet.

exec: console.error('[Pre-request] No roulette session. Run Roulette > Init first.');
pm.test('winning_number_display shows 00 when number is -1', function () {
pm.test('No la_partage field in American roulette breakdown', function () {
pm.test('total_bet field present and correct', function () {

request.description: Top Line bet (0, 00, 1, 2, 3) — unique to American Roulette. 00 is encoded as -1. Payout: 6:1.

exec: console.error('[Pre-request] No roulette session. Run Roulette > Init first.');
pm.test('Status code is 200 or 429 (rate limited)', function () {
pm.test('Top line bet settled correctly', function () {
pm.test('Rate limited — retry after delay', function () {

item.name: Negative Tests
item.description:
Negative / boundary test cases covering input validation, authorization, business rules, and error handling.

These tests verify the API returns correct error codes and messages for invalid inputs.

exec: // Faker: generate invalid test data for negative test
console.log(`[Pre-request] Negative test with bad email: ${badEmail}`);
pm.test('Error response has correct structure', function () {
// Faker: generate invalid test data for negative test

console.log(`[Post-response] Register - Password Too Short (<8 chars): ${pm.response.code} (${pm.response.responseTime}ms)`);
